posts.author: xatxat (Simon Kusterer @ Gorilla Apps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey everyone,

Simon here, developer of the app Spreadsheet Gorilla.

The app allows you to create spreadsheets from multiple monday.com boards, even across workspaces.

We recently released a new feature that I’m excited about and wanted to share: You can now use Spreadsheet Gorilla to use formulas across different boards and directly update related board columns of your choice with the calculated results. This is useful for operations like budget calculations for example.

If you’re interested, here is a short explainer video:

Let me know what you think

– Simon from Gorilla Apps

posts.author: Sue.Menard (Sue)
posts.cookedHtml: I love the concept but can’t get it to work properly. I keep getting an error that the column types don’t match even though a visual check shows they do. Any ideas? II sent a detailed review of issue to your help email).
